data.title: EPWK launching in Jan 2026, starts global supply chain recruitment plan. Amid consumption upgrade trend, looking for substance and emotional connections.
data.description: In Xiamen, China on December 12, 2025, the market is witnessing a rise in demand for products and shopping experiences that provide more value and deeper emotional ties, in line with the trends of consumption upgrade and aesthetic transformation. A notable player in this space is EPWK (Nasdaq: EPWK), a company traded on the Nasdaq stock exchange.

data.title: McDonald's Türkiye launches FRIENDS Meal with Big Mac® and Chicken McNuggets®, show-inspired collectibles, and "Friends Coffee Corner".
data.description: In Istanbul on December 12, 2025, McDonald's Türkiye announced a new addition to its menu inspired by the iconic TV show FRIENDS. The limited-time "FRIENDS Meal" includes popular items like the Big Mac® and Chicken McNuggets® along with Monica's Marinara Sauce. Customers can also collect show-inspired memorabilia with their orders. Moreover, selected locations will have designated "Friends Coffee Corner" areas.

data.title: Singtel named 2025 Singapore Company of the Year for Cybersecurity Services by Frost & Sullivan.
data.description: A company based in Singapore has been recognized as a leader in integrated cyber resilience for its significant market impact, innovation, and commitment to customer security. The accolade was announced on December 12, 2025, by Frost & Sullivan, naming the company as the 2025 Singapore Company of the Year. This acknowledgment highlights the company's success in driving measurable results in the cybersecurity sector.

data.title: R Systems acquires Novigo expanding digital engineering & AI capabilities, starting integration phase.
data.description: In Greater Noida, India and El Dorado Hills, California, R Systems has recently finalized the acquisition of Novigo, making it a subsidiary of the company. The two organizations are now entering a well-planned integration phase to combine their operations seamlessly.

data.title: Worthington Enterprises to report Q2 earnings. Analysts expect earnings at $0.70/share, revenue at $310.60 million. Stock up 1.5% at $58.00.
data.description: Worthington Enterprises, Inc. (NYSE: WOR) is set to announce its second-quarter earnings on December 16 after the market closes. Analysts are anticipating earnings of 70 cents per share, a rise from the previous year's 60 cents per share. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $310.60 million, in contrast to $274.05 million last year. In the first quarter, the company exceeded expectations. Worthington's stock closed at $58.00 on Thursday, up by 1.5%. Find more details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: UAE plans to implement Bitcoin for institutions in Abu Dhabi, while Dubai focuses on stablecoins, Web3, and payments.
data.description: In Abu Dhabi, Bitcoin is being adopted for institutional use, while in Dubai, there is a focus on integrating payments, stablecoins, and Web3 applications into everyday transactions.

data.title: EMA's CHMP commends Bio-Thera and STADA's golimumab biosimilar Gotenfia®, likely to be approved with strong data package.
data.description: The European Medicines Agency has given a favorable opinion for the approval of the golimumab biosimilar Gotenfia®. Developed by Bio-Thera and to be distributed by STADA, the recommendation from EMA's CHMP committee is backed by a comprehensive data package, including strong analytical, non-clinical, and clinical data comparisons. This nod sets the stage for the introduction of Gotenfia® into the market as a biosimilar option for golimumab.
